    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Latitude) &&
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Longitude),

    Launch(
        "https://www.google.com/maps?q=" &
        ThisItem.Latitude & "," & ThisItem.Longitude
    ),

    Notify(
        "Location coordinates are not available.",
        NotificationType.Error

diagnosticContext.formula:
Filter(
    CommunityFirstAid,
    Status.Value = "Unassigned" ||
    Status.Value = "In Progress"&&
    AssignedVolunteer = User().FullName
)

)

diagnosticContext.formula:
Filter(
    CommunityFirstAid,
    Status.Value = "Unassigned" ||
    Status.Value = "In Progress"&&
    AssignedVolunteer = User().FullName
)

"🚨 " & ThisItem.EmergencyType.Value &
Char(10) &
"📍 " & ThisItem.'Location: PlaceName' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: City' & " " & ThisItem.'Location: Postcode' &
Char(10) &
"📝 " & ThisItem.'Description (Optional)' &
Char(10) &
"👤 " & ThisItem.ReporterName &
Char(10) &
"🕒 " & Text(ThisItem.CreatedTime, "dd/mm/yyyy")

)

    AssignedVolunteer = currentUser.Name &&
    (
        AssignmentStatus.Value = "Pending" ||
        AssignmentStatus.Value = "Accepted"
    )
)

"🚨 " & ThisItem.EmergencyType.Value &
Char(10) &
"📍 " & ThisItem.'Location: PlaceName' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: City' & " " & ThisItem.'Location: Postcode' &
Char(10) &
"📝 " & ThisItem.'Description (Optional)' &
Char(10) &
"👤 " & ThisItem.ReporterName &
Char(10) &
"🕒 " & Text(ThisItem.CreatedTime, "dd/mm/yyyy")

diagnosticContext.formula:
Filter(
    CommunityFirstAid,
    Status.Value = "Unassigned" ||
    Status.Value = "In Progress"&&
    AssignedVolunteer = User().FullName
)

"🚨 " & ThisItem.EmergencyType.Value &
Char(10) &
"📍 " & ThisItem.'Location: PlaceName' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: City' & " " & ThisItem.'Location: Postcode' &
Char(10) &
"📝 " & ThisItem.'Description (Optional)' &
Char(10) &
"👤 " & ThisItem.ReporterName &
Char(10) &
"🕒 " & Text(ThisItem.CreatedTime, "dd/mm/yyyy")

diagnosticContext.formula:
If(
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Latitude) &&
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Longitude),

    Launch(
        "https://www.google.com/maps?q=" &
        ThisItem.Latitude & "," & ThisItem.Longitude
    ),

    Notify(
        "Location coordinates are not available.",
        NotificationType.Error
    )
)

If(
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Latitude) &&
    !IsBlank(ThisItem.Longitude),

    Launch(
        "https://www.google.com/maps?q=" &
        ThisItem.Latitude & "," & ThisItem.Longitude
    ),

    Notify(
        "Location coordinates are not available.",
        NotificationType.Error
    )
)

diagnosticContext.formula:
Filter(
    CommunityFirstAid,
    AssignedVolunteer = currentUser.Name &&
    (
        AssignmentStatus.Value = "Pending" ||
        AssignmentStatus.Value = "Accepted"
    )
)

Filter(
    CommunityFirstAid,
    Status.Value = "Unassigned" ||
    Status.Value = "In Progress"&&
    AssignedVolunteer = User().FullName
)

diagnosticContext.formula:
Filter(
    CommunityFirstAid,
    Status.Value = "Unassigned" ||
    Status.Value = "In Progress"&&
    AssignedVolunteer = User().FullName
)

"🚨 " & ThisItem.EmergencyType.Value &
Char(10) &
"📍 " & ThisItem.'Location: PlaceName' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: Street' & ", " & ThisItem.'Location: City' & " " & ThisItem.'Location: Postcode' &
Char(10) &
"📝 " & ThisItem.'Description (Optional)' &
Char(10) &
"👤 " & ThisItem.ReporterName &
Char(10) &
"🕒 " & Text(ThisItem.CreatedTime, "dd/mm/yyyy")

data.info: The number passed in is a blank value.

diagnosticContext.formula:
Filter(
    CommunityFirstAid,
    AssignedVolunteer = currentUser.Name &&
    (
        AssignmentStatus.Value = "Pending" ||
        AssignmentStatus.Value = "Accepted"
    )
)
